creator: nosuzuki@e-mail.ne.jp
text:
Please commit my new port for xzgv image viewer.

from pkg-descr:
xzgv is image file viewer with thumbnail-based file selector. it uses
GTK+ and Imlib libraries and support most image file formats. The
thumbnail file is compatible with xv and Gimp.

Compare to another image file viewer for X, this xzgv uses only one
window and can fit the large image file to the window size without
changing the aspect ratio.

WWW: http://xzgv.browser.org/
-- 
Norio Suzuki
